payload.label: cabinet
payload.short_description: dark wood cabinet corner, top edge
payload.long_description: Close-up, partial view (approx. 0.6 m) of a dark brown stained wooden cabinet corner with recessed rectangular paneling and visible vertical wood grain; the finish appears worn/scuffed near the edges and a light speckled countertop edge is visible along the top — crop is edge-cut and shows only a portion of the cabinet.
